description_long: This is a pair of heavy-duty pliers featuring robust, black and yellow insulated handles designed for a comfortable and secure grip. The handles are straight and slightly contoured, with visible textured yellow grip sections for enhanced control. The jaws are made of metallic steel, showing a serrated gripping surface and a curved, angled design suitable for gripping, twisting, or cutting wires and other materials. The pivot joint is prominent and fixed, providing a strong fulcrum for applying force. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for demanding tasks in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or roadside repairs. The pliers have a utilitarian appearance with some branding visible on the handle.
description: A sturdy pair of black and yellow insulated pliers with serrated steel jaws and textured handles, designed for gripping and cutting tasks. The tool features a fixed pivot and ergonomic grip sections for comfort and control.
description_view_0: Front-facing view showing the dual handles and the partially open jaws, highlighting the yellow grip sections.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the handles and the metallic jaws, with branding visible on the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite front view focusing on the serrated, angled jaws and the symmetry of the handles.
description_view_3: Alternate side view showing the profile of the jaws and the ergonomic contour of the handles.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, insulated, slightly contoured handles with yellow textured grip sections for ergonomic comfort.
attribute_jaw_design: Curved, serrated steel jaws with a robust gripping surface, suitable for general-purpose gripping and cutting; no visible wire cutter or specialty notches.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Fixed pivot joint providing a strong fulcrum; does not appear to be adjustable or slip-joint.
attribute_grip_pattern: Textured, ribbed yellow grip sections on the handles for enhanced tactile feedback and slip resistance.
